title: Le baron de l'écluse
writer: Maurice Druon, Georges Simenon, Michel Audiard
actors: Jean Gabin, Micheline Presle, Jacques Castelot
plot: Antoine, said the Baron, hero of the First World War and penniless, lives in Deauville playing casino. He starts to win some nice money and a yacht as payment. The Baron goes to Monte Carlo. But his luck is likely to turn quickly .
